match.userMessage: Please transcribe this media file for me: https://example.com/video.mp4

response.content: I'll route this transcription request to the media agent. The transcription will be handled shortly.

match.userMessage: Trim this video to the first 30 seconds: https://example.com/video.mp4

response.content: I'll route this trim request to the video agent. The video will be trimmed to the first 30 seconds.

match.userMessage: Can you grab a screenshot of https://example.com

response.content: I'll route this screenshot request to the image agent. A screenshot of the page will be captured.

match.userMessage: Check that the NCA Toolkit API is healthy

response.content: I'll route this health check to the toolkit agent. The API status will be verified.
I can't process local file paths. All source media must be at publicly-accessible URLs. Please upload your file to cloud storage and provide a public URL.
